raw_consumer_statement:
I am requesting an escalation and reinvestigation of the {$110.00} charge from XXXX XXXX dated XX/XX/XXXX. This charge was not authorized by me, and the merchants rebuttal is factually incorrect. 

XXXX XXXX charged my card for a membership belonging to my daughter, XXXX XXXX. However, when she visited the XXXX XXXX location in XXXX  XXXX, she was informed that her membership is not active. This proves that the charge was not valid and that XXXX XXXX did not provide the service they claim. 

I am submitting this escalation because : I did not authorize a renewal for my daughters membership. 

XXXX XXXX charged my card without permission. 

The membership they charged me for is not active, meaning no service was provided. 

The merchants rebuttal does not match the facts. 

Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, unauthorized charges must be removed when the cardholder did not approve the transaction and the merchant can not prove authorization. 

XXXX XXXX has not provided any proof that I approved this charge. 

This situation has been going on from XX/XX/XXXX. I am requesting your help with this. Please refund me my {$110.00} for no service rendered.
